name: C. elegans lysosomal surveillance response and healthspan study
summary: C. elegans RNAi and stress-response experiments testing whether partial v-ATPase perturbation activates a lysosomal surveillance response, improves aggregate clearance, and extends healthspan.
model_system: C. elegans partial v-ATPase subunit RNAi, including vha-6, plus proteotoxic disease models
